---
name: Spec Improvement
about: Suggest a clarification, correction, or addition to an existing specification
title: "[SPEC] "
labels: improvement
assignees: ''
---

**Which spec?**
- [ ] AARP (Agent Registration Protocol)
- [ ] AWCP (Agent Wallet Connection Protocol)
- [ ] APDP (Agent Peer Discovery Protocol)
- [ ] SKILL.md

**What should change?**
Describe the current text/behavior and what it should say instead.

**Why?**
What problem does this solve? Reference real agent implementations if possible.
